title: Invalid DateTime error when filtering Google Sheets data
symptom: When attempting to filter data by dates from Google Sheets, n8n throws an 'invalid DateTime' error, even when using DateTime.now().
root_cause: The error occurs because the DateTime parsing in n8n requires a timezone to be set in the workflow. Without a timezone, n8n cannot accurately interpret the date strings, leading to the 'invalid DateTime' error.
fix_steps: Set the correct timezone for your workflow
Retry filtering the data by date
agent_instruction: Set the timezone in your workflow settings to resolve the invalid DateTime error.
